figures.title: Modern Dataset Size by Season
figures.description: Shows yearly sample size and race count for the 2019-2025 modern historical analysis dataset.

figures.title: Race Outcome Rates by Grid Position
figures.description: Compares win, podium, and top-10 rates for each starting grid position without 2026 data.

figures.title: Qualifying Position and Race Outcome
figures.description: Shows how qualifying position relates to podium rate, top-10 rate, and average finish without 2026 data.

figures.title: Grid Advantage: Historical vs Modern Era
figures.description: Compares grid-position outcome rates between long-run history and the 2019-2025 modern historical dataset.

figures.title: Top 10 Drivers by Total Points
figures.description: Ranks the top drivers in the 2019-2025 modern historical dataset by total points.

figures.title: Top Constructors by Total Points
figures.description: Ranks constructors by total points in the 2019-2025 modern historical dataset.

figures.title: Driver Points Trend, Top 6 Modern Drivers
figures.description: Shows season-by-season point trends for the highest-scoring drivers.

figures.title: Constructor Points Trend, Top 6 Modern Teams
figures.description: Shows season-by-season point trends for leading constructors.

figures.title: Formula 1 Race Count by Year
figures.description: Shows the expansion of the F1 calendar from 1950 to 2018.

figures.title: Historical Top 10 Driver Wins
figures.description: Ranks the top race-winning drivers in the historical SQLite data.

figures.title: Historical Top 10 Constructor Wins
figures.description: Ranks the top race-winning constructors in the historical SQLite data.

figures.title: Circuits with Highest Pole Win Rate
figures.description: Highlights circuits where pole position most often converted to victory without 2026 data.

figures.title: Driver Points Heatmap, Top 10 Drivers
figures.description: Shows year-by-year points for the top modern drivers as a compact heatmap.

figures.title: Constructor Points Share, Top 6 Teams
figures.description: Shows how leading teams' point totals changed relative to each other over time.

figures.title: Constructor Podiums and Wins
figures.description: Compares podium counts and wins by constructor in the modern historical period.

figures.title: Driver Podiums and Wins
figures.description: Compares podium counts and wins by driver in the modern historical period.

figures.title: Race Result Status Mix by Season
figures.description: Shows the share of finished, lapped, and other race statuses by season.

figures.title: Average Position Change by Circuit
figures.description: Contrasts circuits where drivers tend to gain or lose positions from start to finish.

figures.title: Qualifying Position vs Finish Position Heatmap
figures.description: Shows the joint distribution of qualifying position and final race position.

figures.title: Constructor Championship Rank Bump Chart
figures.description: Shows how leading constructor ranking changed across seasons.

figures.title: Circuit Grid Importance Bubble Chart
figures.description: Compares circuits by pole win rate, position-change volatility, race count, and grid-finish correlation.

figures.title: Driver Performance and Consistency
figures.description: Compares drivers by average finish, finish variability, podium rate, and average points.

figures.title: Constructor Qualifying-to-Race Efficiency
figures.description: Compares teams' average grid position with average finish position, sized by podium rate.

figures.title: Race Position Change Distribution
figures.description: Shows how often drivers gained or lost positions relative to their grid starts.
